meaning: n.战利品,奖品vt.用战利品装饰,授予...奖品
examples: He held the trophy proudly aloft.
His name was inscribed on the trophy.
He lifted the trophy up and kissed it.
Buck's T-4 Lodge is a rambling roadhouse, with log walls, stone fireplaces and trophy heads.
This year, that logo consists of the Lombardi Trophy above the silver Roman numerals XLVI.
